body.raw:
Hey, I’m Vishal.

I’m a mechanical engineering and data science graduate from the Indian Institute of Technology Madras, and I work as a Strategy & Business Design Analyst at Monitor Deloitte.

In my day job, I work across deliverables and stakeholders on growth strategy and business development. Outside that, I remain curious about frontier technology and startups.

This site is a log of my positions and curiosities. I’ve also kept a few things here that help me stay sharp, like reading and training.
